data.name: COME INSIDE MY INNER WORLD
data.detailed_description:
You've always been waiting for this invitation: "COME INSIDE MY INNER WORLD"!

It's time to reward yourself with a meeting with beautiful girls. Win their hearts, trust and love for the most responsive and accessible hentai experience of your life.

Enjoy simple clicker gameplay and watch the girls strip, moan and get excited by your gentle and persistent taps. Don't be distracted by gameplay bells and whistles, annoying game conventions and an overloaded plot. There are only you, sexy hentai girls and a simple way to get them. Go ahead and enjoy!

The game offers two modes for true connoisseurs:
♥ In Progress Mode, you are a conqueror. With each click, you move forward, revealing the sensuality of one sexy girl after another.
♥ In "Unlimited Mode" you are enjoying your trophies. You can admire their sexy poses, moans and sighs for as long as you want.

So What's Inside?

(cut below)


    ♥ Hentai girls: they are just waiting for you to come to their inner world
    ♥ A lot of sensual erotic positions
    ♥ Responsive moans and sighs: for a complete audiovisual experience
    ♥ 42 Joyful achievements for you
    ♥ Diverse music: for relaxation and sensual enjoyment
    ♥ Expanding gallery: at any time, return to the girls and poses you discovered
    ♥ A set of unlockable bonuses to speed up progress
    ♥ Two game modes: for progress and for endless enjoyment

This game does not promise you unimaginable impressions and mind-blowing gameplay. It is a simple, understandable and sensual pleasure when you get tired of complexities.

What are you waiting for? The girls are impatient! Go and open their inner world!

data.short_description: Relaxing hentai video game: win the hearts of anime girls and enjoy their poses, moans and desire... You can choose leveling or enjoying the process. And you can always remember the most delightful moments in the gallery. 42 memetic achievements included. Just don't forget to add to your wishlist!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: OS: WINDOWS® 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
